title: Generated Story: City-wide signal rupture under civic pressure

npc_profiles.name: Kael
npc_profiles.red_line: Kael: Do not sacrifice civilian corridors for short-term speed.

npc_profiles.name: Niko
npc_profiles.red_line: Niko: Do not erase operational evidence under political pressure.
